violations.text: Food containers were observed stored on the floor in the back deli area. Food containers must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Boxes relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
A pipe was observed leaking in the produce back room. Pipe to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

Cream and half & half were observed held at 47-52 degrees Fahrenheit in the cream open air cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cream and half & half were voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 40-46 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Remaining items on the shelf were relocated to another refrigeration unit during time of inspection. Open air cooler was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. The person in charge put a work order in. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023

Self-serve rolls, bagels, and muffins are lacking label information. Self-serve food items in a food establishment must be labeled or information must be available to the customer with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment placed signs on the display cases notifying customers to ask staff for label information. Establishment had all the information in a binder during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023

Pickles and shrimp were observed stored on the floor in the deli walk-in cooler and the perishable frozen foods walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. Per person in charge, ice is used for seafood display case and does not make contact with any food nor is it for consumption. The person in charge elected to dispose of it (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on the seafood department prep table and on the walk-in freezer door handle in the in the back stock area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023
